# Fazle Ryan — Full-Stack Developer

> Fazle Ryan Chowdhury is a full-stack developer based in Kitchener, ON, Canada (EST timezone). He builds production-grade web applications, REST APIs, real-time systems, and data pipelines.

## About

Fazle Ryan builds web apps that feel simple on the surface and stay solid underneath. His strongest lane is backend and product infrastructure: Laravel and Node.js, clean REST APIs, auth flows, background jobs, queues, caching, and databases that stay consistent under real production load.

On the frontend he works in React and Vue, with a focus on clean layout, consistent components, fast load, and UI states that don't panic when the API is slow or the data is empty.

He uses AI tools to move faster, but treats their output like a junior dev: helpful, not unconditionally trusted. He still reviews, refactors, and tests like a grown-up.

## Contact

- Email: mail@fazleryan.com
- Phone: +1 (437) 234-6677
- Website: https://fazleryan.com

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/fazle-ryan
- Upwork: https://www.upwork.com/freelancers/fazleryan

## Technical Skills

### Backend
- Laravel (PHP), Node.js, Express
- REST API design, auth flows (JWT, sessions, OAuth)
- Background jobs, queues (Bull + Redis, Laravel Horizon)
- MongoDB, MySQL, PostgreSQL, Redis, Elasticsearch
- Socket.IO (real-time), Stripe billing, webhooks, idempotency

### Frontend
- Vue 3 (Composition API, Pinia), React (hooks, context)
- TypeScript, JavaScript (ES2022+)
- Nuxt 3, Next.js
- Tailwind CSS, responsive design

### DevOps / Tooling
- Docker, Linux, Nginx
- Playwright (browser automation, scraping), Cheerio (HTML parsing)
- Hugging Face AI integrations
- Git, GitHub Actions

## Featured Project: CrawlerPro

A full-stack web crawler platform built for structured data extraction at scale.

- Frontend: Vue 3 dashboard with live crawl progress, nested selectors, CSV/Excel export
- Backend: Express + MongoDB + Bull/Redis queue pipeline + Socket.IO real-time events
- Scraping: Playwright (JS-rendered pages) + Cheerio (HTML parsing)
- AI layer: Hugging Face integration for smarter extraction
- Live: http://crawler.onthis.website
- Repo: https://github.com/ryan7998/crawler

## Work History & Availability

Available for freelance and contract work. Based in Canada (EST), working remotely. Clients on Upwork can view full work history at https://www.upwork.com/freelancers/fazleryan.
